trigger: 休息室内,跪求高令宁同意婚事,沈词护着她

appearance_delta.face: 泪流满面,眼神绝望又倔强
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 泪痕满面,柔弱中带着不甘的倔强

costume_override.outfit: 素色襦裙,衣衫因跪地而褶皱

visual_reference: young Chinese woman kneeling on ground in pale hanfu, tears streaming down face, desperate yet stubborn expression, trembling body, disheveled appearance, indoor dim lighting, emotional breakdown scene, pitiful and vulnerable
emotional_tone: 绝望哀求,柔弱倔强,激发同情
